summary: Iteration 24 - Verified frontend refactor from hardcoded REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to relative '/api' paths. All 9 backend auth/admin tests passed (login, /auth/me, logout, /admin/all-users, /admin/classes, /admin/learning-plans, role-based access). Frontend Playwright tests confirm: login redirects admin to /admin-dashboard, all 4 dashboard tabs (User Management, Learning Plans, Financials, Reports) visible and clickable, logout button works and redirects to /login, ProtectedRoute redirects unauth users to /login, and all API requests resolve to the same preview origin (no hardcoded domains in network calls). grep confirms 0 occurrences of process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL in /app/frontend/src/.

minor.issue: Response payload includes user.password_hash field (security leak)

features_verified.dashboard_tabs: PASSED - User Management, Learning Plans, Financials, Reports visible and clickable
features_verified.protected_route: PASSED - unauth visit to /admin-dashboard redirects to /login
features_verified.relative_api_paths: PASSED - all /api/* network requests use same-origin (skill-exchange-149.preview.emergentagent.com); 0 hardcoded REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL references in src/

action_items: (Pre-existing, not from this refactor) Backend /api/auth/login returns user.password_hash in JSON response — should be excluded via Pydantic response_model.
critical_code_review_comments: utils/api.js cleanly exports relative '/api' base. All 26 frontend files now import from this single source — refactor verified end-to-end.
Login response leaks password_hash (security). Not introduced by this refactor but worth fixing.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, all 4 tabs, logout, protected route, same-origin API verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend uses relative /api paths via /app/frontend/src/utils/api.js (export const API = '/api'). Confirmed 0 process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL refs in src/. Cookie auth (httponly, samesite=none, secure) + Bearer fallback both work. Logout button has data-testid='logout-button' in admin header. AdminDashboard fetch endpoints: /api/admin/all-users, /api/admin/classes, /api/admin/transactions, /api/admin/learning-plans, /api/admin/complaints, /api/admin/approved-proofs, /api/admin/badge-templates, /api/admin/counsellor-tracking, /api/admin/payments.
